title: 2026-06-26 Sao Paulo Jabuticaba Winter Motion
summary: Sao Paulo mild-winter set using jabuticaba purple across a Liberdade mini-skirt errand, SESC Pompeia-style jacket movement, a Vila Madalena live-bar dance circle, and a Copan cafe reflection date.
summaryJa: サンパウロのアルバム。色の軸はジャブチカバパープル。構成はマーケット、イベント会場、音楽の場、飲食店。

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman walking out of a Liberdade-style Sao Paulo bakery arcade while answering an off-frame friend, wearing a black pleated mini skirt over safety shorts, ivory short-sleeve knit polo, jabuticaba-purple cropped nylon jacket, bare legs, black Mary Jane flats worn without socks, silver hoops, and a purple hair clip
images.title: 01 Weekend Liberdade mini skirt
images.tags: Clean Cel Anime / Sao Paulo / weekend / 18-19-adult
images.locationDetail: out of a Liberdade-style Sao Paulo bakery arcade

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman moving through a SESC Pompeia-style concrete and brick cultural corridor, pulling a jabuticaba-purple cropped nylon jacket from one shoulder over a sleeveless charcoal rib knit, taupe loose trousers, bare ankles, black leather mules worn without socks, silver cuff, and black tote
images.title: 02 Outerwear SESC Pompeia jacket
images.locationDetail: SESC Pompeia-style concrete and brick cultural corridor

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman stepping into a Vila Madalena-style live-music bar dance circle under string lights, laughing toward an off-frame partner while wearing a jabuticaba-purple satin bias mini wrap skirt over black dance shorts, fitted black scoop-neck top, sheer charcoal cardigan, smoky black thigh-high stockings with the top band above the knee, low black strappy dance shoes, hoop earrings, and a slim waist chain
images.title: 03 Dance Vila Madalena live circle

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman near a Copan-style Sao Paulo cafe arcade threshold, checking her reflection in glass while holding a black clutch and adjusting purple drop earrings, wearing an ivory asymmetrical sleeveless draped top, deep jabuticaba-purple wrap midi skirt, bare legs, and low pointed black slingback pumps
images.title: 04 Date Copan glass reflection
images.tags: Soft Real Art / Sao Paulo / date / 25-29
images.locationDetail: Copan-style Sao Paulo cafe arcade threshold
